zh.lifeSummary: 當John Howard於大約1276年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas37歲，母親Gilla de Terrington31歲。他於1309年與Joan Cornwall在英國史洛普爾布福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1331年在英國素福爾可享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Howard于大约1276年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas37岁，母亲Gilla de Terrington31岁。他于1309年与Joan Cornwall在英国史洛普爾布福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1331年在英国素福爾可享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可易亞斯特 文其。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Howard was born about 1276, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas, was 37 and his mother, Gilla de Terrington, was 31. He married Joan Cornwall in 1309, in Burford, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1331, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in East Winch, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Howard est né environ 1276, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Gilla de Terrington, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Cornwall en 1309, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1331, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à East Winch, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.All Saints Churchyard, East Winch, Kings: East Winch, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Howard um 1276 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas 37 und seine Mutter Gilla de Terrington 31. Er hat 1309 in Burford, Shropshire, England Joan Cornwall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1331 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Suffolk, England und wurde in East Winch, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Howardが約1276年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleasは37歳，母Gilla de Terringtonは31歳であった。1309年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードでJoan Cornwallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1331年にイギリススフォルクで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ウィンチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Howard(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Gilla de Terrington(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1309년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 Joan Cornwall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1331년 영국 수폴크에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 윈치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Cornwall em 1309, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Howard родился около 1276 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Howard Justice Of Common Pleas было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Gilla de Terrington, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Cornwall в 1309 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1331 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст винч, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
